transcription.text: Now instant J-Wax in a new faster formula gives you the beauty and the protection of wax. Something those liquid polishes cannot match. Yet instant J-Wax is just as easy to use. Wipes to a brilliant luster that's guaranteed by Johnson's to outlast any other one-step wax or your money back. Get the beauty and the protection that only instant J-Wax can give. Also available regular J-Wax.
